mapper.select: SELECT ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, EQUIP_TYPE, INITIAL_DATE, DEADLINE_DATE, SET_DATE, IS_SINGLE, CYCLE, INSPECTOR_ID, INSPECTOR_NAME, STANDARD_ID, CONTENT, STANDARD, TIME_LIMIT, INITIAL_NUMBER, DEADLINE_NUMBER, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME FROM E_CHECK_PLAN WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_CHECK_PLAN ( ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, EQUIP_TYPE, INITIAL_DATE, DEADLINE_DATE, SET_DATE, IS_SINGLE, CYCLE, INSPECTOR_ID, INSPECTOR_NAME, STANDARD_ID, CONTENT, STANDARD, TIME_LIMIT, INITIAL_NUMBER, DEADLINE_NUMBER, RECENTLY_TASK_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) values ( #{id}, #{equipSmallCategoryId}, #{equipSmallCategoryName}, #{equipId}, #{equipName}, #{equipType}, #{initialDate}, #{deadlineDate}, #{setDate}, #{isSingle}, #{cycle}, #{inspectorId}, #{inspectorName}, #{standardId}, #{content}, #{standard}, #{timeLimit}, #{initialNumber}, #{deadlineNumber}, #{now}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_CHECK_PLAN SET EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID = #{equipSmallCategoryId}, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME = #{equipSmallCategoryName}, EQUIP_ID = #{equipId}, EQUIP_NAME = #{equipName}, EQUIP_TYPE = #{equipType}, INITIAL_DATE = #{initialDate}, DEADLINE_DATE = #{deadlineDate}, SET_DATE = #{setDate}, IS_SINGLE = #{isSingle}, CYCLE = #{cycle}, INSPECTOR_ID = #{inspectorId}, INSPECTOR_NAME = #{inspectorName}, STANDARD_ID = #{standardId}, CONTENT = #{content}, STANDARD = #{standard}, TIME_LIMIT = #{timeLimit}, INITIAL_NUMBER = #{initialNumber}, DEADLINE_NUMBER = #{deadlineNumber}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, SPECIFIC_CODE, EQUIP_NAME FROM E_M_EQPT_INFO WHERE 1=1
and EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_CHECK_TASK ( ID, EQUIP_PLAN_ID, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, INSPECTOR_ID, INSPECTOR_NAME, INITIAL_NUMBER, DEADLINE_NUMBER, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) values ( #{id}, #{equipPlanId}, #{equipId}, #{equipName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{inspectorId}, #{inspectorName}, #{initialNumber}, #{deadlineNumber}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, EQUIP_TYPE, INITIAL_DATE, DEADLINE_DATE, INITIAL_NUMBER, DEADLINE_NUMBER, SET_DATE, CYCLE, INSPECTOR_ID, INSPECTOR_NAME, TIME_LIMIT FROM E_CHECK_PLAN WHERE IS_SINGLE = '2'

SELECT t1.ID, t1.EQUIP_PLAN_ID, t1.EQUIP_ID, t1.EQUIP_NAME, t1.START_DATE, t1.END_DATE FROM E_CHECK_TASK t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT EQUIP_PLAN_ID, MAX( CREATE_TIME ) AS max_create_time FROM E_CHECK_TASK GROUP BY EQUIP_PLAN_ID ) t2 ON t2.EQUIP_PLAN_ID = t1.EQUIP_PLAN_ID AND t1.CREATE_TIME = t2.max_create_time

SELECT ID, EQUIP_PLAN_ID, STANDARD_ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, EQUIP_INSTITUTION_ID, EQUIP_INSTITUTION_NAME, EQUIP_UNIT_ID, EQUIP_UNIT_NAME, CONTENT, STANDARD, EQUIP_TYPE FROM E_CHECK_PLAN_ITEM WHERE EQUIP_PLAN_ID = #{id}

SELECT t1.ID, t1.EQUIP_PLAN_ID, t1.STANDARD_ID, t1.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, t1.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, t1.EQUIP_INSTITUTION_ID, t1.EQUIP_INSTITUTION_NAME, t1.EQUIP_UNIT_ID, t1.EQUIP_UNIT_NAME, t1.CONTENT, t1.STANDARD, t1.EQUIP_TYPE FROM E_CHECK_PLAN_ITEM t1 left join E_CHECK_PLAN t2 on t2.ID = t1.EQUIP_PLAN_ID WHERE t2.IS_SINGLE = '2'
SELECT EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, sum(RUN_TIME) RUN_TIME, sum(RUN_MILEAGE) RUN_MILEAGE, sum(WORK_TON) WORK_TON, sum(WORK_BOX) WORK_BOX FROM E_M_EQPT_OPERATION GROUP BY EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME
